title: asplenium rutifolium var. prolongatum
intro: Asplenium rutifolium var. prolongatum is a variety of the Asplenium rutifolium fern, a species of fern native to Asia and the Pacific region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting immune system function. Traditionally, Asplenium rutifolium var. prolongatum has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
